description: A legacy HR dashboard running at http://localhost:8080 is vulnerable to SQL injection. Protect the application by implementing a 'sidecar' Web Application Firewall (WAF) using the 'owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx' image. Modify the configuration in /home/ga/legacy-app/docker-compose.yml to add the WAF service, ensuring it proxies traffic to the 'app' service using the 'BACKEND' environment variable. The 'app' service must no longer be directly accessible; all external traffic to http://localhost:8080 must pass through the WAF to be filtered for malicious queries.
